Off Calendar Jun-26-2017 Continued To Aug-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sandra Price and Wendy Tice-Wallner for Clifford Wong.
Garret Deal for Diane Berg.

Ms. Wallner stated that she believed they had withdrawn in 2013, that the substitution of attorney was accepted in 2013, that the form is out of sync with case law and that there is no litigation going on. Ms. Wallner also stated that they have not represented Mr. Wong since 2013 and asked the Court to grant their withdrawal as of 2013. Mr. Deal stated that he has no objection to them withdrawing, that he will be representing Ms. Berg and Mr. Wong, and that he will steer the matter to conclusion. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel (subject to review of the order). Status on close of Estate is continued to June 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
